title: Westrex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Westrex''' was a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] district in the city of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]] on [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. [[The Port Line]] passenger conveyor tube connected Westrex to the city's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], [[Efavan Port]]. The casinos were located along the [[Casino Line]]. One such casino was called the [[Hand Pot (casino)|Hand Pot]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
